query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="sourcecategory_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<sourcecategory>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
| bytes/1024/1024 as mb 
| timeslice 15m| sum(mb) as mb by sourcecategory ,_timeslice
| if (sourcecategory matches "*_volume","views",sourcecategory) as sourcecategory
| total mb as tmb by _timeslice
| if (mb/tmb <.01,"others",sourcecategory) as sourcecategory 
| sum(mb) as mbby sourcecategory,_timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column sourcecategory

sources.panelTitle: Collection Over Time by sourcecategory > 1% ingest
